title:
I built a closed-loop learning system for trading signals — 
agents evaluate their own outcomes and update weights automatically
author: Distinct_Citron_6427
selftext:
https://preview.redd.it/jii6pmph4b5h1.png?width=1507&format=png&auto=webp&s=63e3c1547e52ab87b22207651ed8dde93b04cba2

The system works like this: - Signal fires → stores entry price, stop, target - After N bars (timeframe-relative), fetches Polygon bars - Computes direction accuracy + R:R outcome - Updates condition weights via Bayesian adjustment - Changes < 20% apply automatically; > 20% requires manual approval I used Supabase + Netlify functions for the backend. The frontend runs 5 simultaneous agents: momentum, macro, microstructure, contrarian, composite. AMA about the architecture. Platform is [tradolux.com](http://tradolux.com) if you want to see it live.
